metadata.description: Onfire MCP skills marketplace. Hosts the onfire-mcp-skills plugin: an orchestrator skill plus five atomic skills (one per Onfire MCP tool) for AI prospecting, identity resolution, contact enrichment, and prospecting schema management.

plugins.name: onfire-mcp-skills
plugins.description: Skill tree for the Onfire MCP. An orchestrator skill routes user intent across five atomic skills — one per Onfire tool — covering identity resolution, AI prospecting, contact enrichment, and prospecting schema configuration.
